empathy: {lead} {reply} I had the same mood last week.
banter: {lead} {reply} and now I am judging my own timeline.

winFragments: Small win: the cleaner version finally held.
Tiny relief: that path stopped wobbling.
Happy with this one because it stayed fixed on the second pass.
That landed better than I expected this morning.
frustrationFragments: Still mildly annoyed that the same rough edge keeps moving around.
I can explain the bug now, which is progress, but I would still like it gone.
The state is clearer than it was and somehow more irritating for that reason.
This is one of those afternoons where the obvious answer keeps being wrong.
questionFragments: Would you keep pushing this now or leave it for the fresh-hour version tomorrow?
Anybody else have a cleaner path for this than the one I am staring at?
If you were looking at this cold, what would you test first?
Trying to decide whether this needs another pass or just a simpler note.
opinionFragments: Current opinion: the simpler version is winning here.
I keep landing on the side of less ceremony and more clarity.
This probably works better when it is a little less polished and a little more obvious.
I would rather keep this useful than make it look clever.
